reasoning: The base value for 2025-03-02 will likely be around $74.76 (the last trading day, Feb 28). The FRED statistical trend analysis estimates a 47% probability of the price being higher by March 9, given short-term downward momentum (-0.13/day) offset slightly by seasonal patterns. Recent market reports (Jan 2025) indicate the ICE Brent forward curve is in backwardation, suggesting future delivery prices are lower than spot prices, reflecting expectations of increased market supply later this year (e.g., OPEC+ unwinding cuts) and pulling the expected spot price down over time. As a result, the probability of a price increase remains slightly below 50% across all horizons. Consistent with forecasting principles, uncertainty increases (probability moves closer to 0.50) as the forecast horizon extends to 1 year, accounting for long-term mean reversion and higher volatility over longer periods.
